headline: DTE Energy Bolsters Growth With Focused Renewable Investments
summary: DTE expands its renewable footprint with major capital plans, aiming for long-term growth despite ongoing challenges in its energy trading operations.

headline: 4 Low-Beta Defensive Stocks to Take Refuge in Amid Sky-High Inflation
summary: ATO, AWR, KDP, ETR emerge as low-beta picks as inflation spikes on Iran tensions, boosting the appeal of defensive stocks with steady growth outlooks.

headline: Wall Street Firms Assert Meta Platforms, Inc. (META) as a Top Growth Stock in Billionaire Philippe Laffont’s portfolio
summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is one of the top growth stocks in billionaire Philippe Laffont’s portfolio. On April 1, Bank of America touted Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) as one of the top stock recommendations after the recent sell-off in the broader equity market. According to the research firm, Meta is one of the companies well-positioned […]
